name: Khách sạn & Spa Ký Ức Trung tâm Hà Nội (Ha Noi Memory Central Hotel & Spa)
address: 90 Đ. Trần Nhật Duật, Phố Cổ, Hà Nội, Việt Nam
description:
Khách sạn & Spa Ký Ức Trung tâm Hà Nội

Tận dụng nhiều điểm thu hút mà Hà Nội có với việc ở lại Khách sạn & Spa Ký Ức Trung tâm Hà Nội. Trải nghiệm văn hóa đích thực của Hà Nội thật dễ dàng khi ở lại Khách sạn & Spa Ký Ức Trung tâm Hà Nội, cách Phố Cổ chỉ 390 m.
Tại Khách sạn & Spa Ký Ức Trung tâm Hà Nội, khách nhất định sẽ có một kỳ nghỉ thư thái. Không bao giờ mất liên lạc với các mối liên hệ của quý khách, với Wi-Fi miễn phí được cung cấp trong suốt thời gian của quý khách. Nếu quý khách cần một chuyến xe đi từ hoặc đến sân bay, khách sạn có thể sắp xếp xe trước ngày quý khách nhận phòng. Khách sạn cung cấp các dịch vụ taxi, cho thuê xe hơi và xe đưa đón để giúp quý khách đến nơi mình muốn ở Hà Nội. Đối với những khách đến bằng xe hơi, bãi đỗ xe được cung cấp miễn phí. Quý khách sẽ không gặp vấn đề gì khi lên kế hoạch cho các ngày và nhu cầu vận chuyển của mình với các dịch vụ quầy lễ tân bao gồm két sắt, nhận phòng hoặc trả phòng nhanh, giữ hành lý và Dịch vụ nhân viên chăm sóc khách hàng. Nếu quý khách muốn có chỗ ngồi để giải trí tốt nhất tại thành phố, quý khách có thể nhận được sự giúp đỡ qua chuyến du lịch và dịch vụ vé của khách sạn. Những tối lạnh giá thậm chí còn tuyệt hơn những tối ấm áp, khi quý khách có thể sưởi ấm bên lò sưởi của khách sạn. Mặc trang phục yêu thích của quý khách lại nhiều lần nhờ phòng máy giặt tự động, dịch vụ giặt khô và dịch vụ giặt là được cung cấp tại Khách sạn & Spa Ký Ức Trung tâm Hà Nội. Những tiện ích trong phòng như dịch vụ tại phòng, dịch vụ tại phòng 24 giờ và dọn phòng hằng ngày sẽ làm cho kỳ nghỉ trở thành một lựa chọn tuyệt vời. Quý khách quên đóng gói thứ gì đó? Tất cả nhu cầu vào phút cuối của quý khách có thể được cửa hàng tiện lợi đáp ứng, giúp quý khách tiết kiệm thời gian và không gặp rắc rối. Vì sự thoải mái và sức khỏe của tất cả khách nghỉ, hút thuốc bị cấm tại bất kỳ nơi nào trong khuôn viên khách sạn.
Hút thuốc chỉ được giới hạn trong các khu vực được chỉ định vì sức khỏe và sự an toàn của tất cả khách nghỉ và nhân viên. Một loạt các tiện nghi được cung cấp tại các phòng nghỉ ở Khách sạn & Spa Ký Ức Trung tâm Hà Nội. Nghỉ lại vui vẻ hơn nữa tại khách sạn khi biết rằng một số phòng được chọn bao gồm rèm che ánh sáng và điều hòa.
Một số phòng tại Khách sạn & Spa Ký Ức Trung tâm Hà Nội thậm chí còn có các đặc điểm thiết kế thêm như ban công hoặc sân hiên. Một số phòng có ti-vi để làm cho khách lúc nào cũng thấy thoải mái giải trí.
Trong một số phòng chọn lọc, quý khách có thể tùy ý sử dụng máy pha trà hoặc cà phê, nước đóng chai và tủ lạnh nhỏ chứa đồ uống. Thật tốt khi biết rằng máy sấy tóc và vật dụng tắm rửa được cung cấp trong một số phòng tắm của khách.

Ăn uống và các hoạt động

Mỗi buổi sáng, quý khách có thể bắt đầu ngày mới với bữa sáng ngon miệng tại chỗ được phục vụ ở Khách sạn & Spa Ký Ức Trung tâm Hà Nội. Tận hưởng niềm hạnh phúc buổi sáng với một ngụm cà phê ngon tại quán cà phê nằm bên trong khách sạn. Trong suốt thời gian lưu trú của quý khách, hãy chọn từ nhiều lựa chọn ăn uống ngon miệng tại khách sạn. Quý khách có thể có một đêm đáng nhớ với những người đồng hành của mình mà không cần đi đâu xa, tại quán bar của khách sạn.
Tại Khách sạn & Spa Ký Ức Trung tâm Hà Nội, quý khách thậm chí có thể đặt giao thực phẩm tới tận phòng của mình với dịch vụ thuận tiện của họ.
Ngoài các tiện nghi và dịch vụ, Khách sạn & Spa Ký Ức Trung tâm Hà Nội còn đi xa hơn nữa nhằm đảm bảo rằng tất cả khách nghỉ đều tận dụng tối đa thời gian của họ. Làm ấm vào cuối ngày với một chuyến ghé qua tiệm làm đẹp, mát-xa và spa.
Thời gian dành cho gia đình vào những buổi tối thư thái thật dễ dàng với phòng chờ chung và khu vực TV của khách sạn.

sample_comments.text: Tôi ấn tượng với nhân viên đã hỗ trợ rất tốt. Phòng nghỉ sạch sẽ mặc dù có hơi cũ một chút nhưng đầy đủ tất cả các thiết bị cần thiết. Phòng của tôi là 804. Tôi ở chỉ một đêm để chờ lên máy bay về Thái Lan.
sample_comments.title: Nhân viên phục vụ tốt, phòng ốc sạch sẽ.
sample_comments.room_type: Phòng Deluxe King có ban công

sample_comments.text: Các khách sạn ở Hà Nội đã tăng giá đáng kể so với trước đây. Tuy nhiên, trong số đó có những nơi giá cả phải chăng, mặc dù hơi cũ nhưng vị trí tốt và khá sạch sẽ. Điều đáng tiếc là wifi yếu và áp lực nước của vòi sen ở nơi tôi ở khá yếu vì là tầng cao, nhưng ngoài hai điều này thì tôi hài lòng.
sample_comments.title: Vị trí tốt và giá cả phải chăng.
sample_comments.room_type: Phòng Deluxe King có ban công

sample_comments.text: Nhân viên khách sạn rất dễ thương, phòng hơi cũ 1 chút nhưng gần trung tâm phố cổ dễ đi lại ăn uống và mua sắm, giá phòng hạt dẻ. phù hợp với giá tiền. Rất sạch sẽ
sample_comments.title: Trên cả tuyệt vời
sample_comments.room_type: Phòng Cao Cấp Cho Hai Người

sample_comments.text:
Vị trí tuyệt vời. Có thể đi bộ đến phố cổ và nằm gần đường lớn nên dễ dàng bắt Grab. 
Giường ngủ khá thoải mái so với giá tiền. 
Cửa sổ không thể đóng hoàn toàn nên luôn nghe thấy tiếng ồn từ bên ngoài. 
Có thể gửi vali ở sảnh bên cạnh quầy lễ tân, nhưng không có nhãn để nhận đồ và nhân viên thường rời khỏi chỗ nên có khả năng bị mất đồ.
sample_comments.title: Rất tốt

sample_comments.text: Phòng sạch sẽ, không có mùi hôi, máy lạnh mát nhưng phòng không kín tiếng. Phòng hướng ra đường có tiếng còi rất lớn, có thể không ngủ được vào ban ngày nhưng ban đêm không có tiếng còi nhiều nên dễ dàng ngủ ngon. Nơi ở nằm gần các điểm tham quan, di chuyển thuận tiện, có bữa sáng buffet phục vụ, thực đơn món ăn tương đối đa dạng.
sample_comments.title: Phòng nghỉ

sample_comments.text: Sẽ quay lại lần sau. Thích nhất cô bé lễ tân, vui vẻ, xinh xắn và năng động hỗ trợ rất tốt
sample_comments.title: Khách sạn khá tốt
sample_comments.room_type: Phòng Deluxe King có ban công

sample_comments.text: Vị trí khách sạn rất thuận lợi để di chuyển đi chơi trong Phố Cổ, dù nằm trong hẻm nhỏ nhưng dễ tìm. Phòng hơi nhỏ sẽ không có tủ đồ nên sẽ phù hợp với chuyến đi ngắn ngày. Nhân viên nhiệt tình và vui vẻ!
sample_comments.title: Tuyệt vời!
sample_comments.room_type: Phòng Cao Cấp Cho Hai Người

sample_comments.text: Khách sạn sạch sẽ, siêu xinh luôn í ạ. Nhân viên nhiệt tình, dễ thương. Nếu có dịp mình sẽ quay lại
sample_comments.title: Đáng để quay lại

sample_comments.text: Mọi thứ tạm ổn trừ lễ tân, vì lễ tân còn trên cả tuyệt vời. Cô bé xinh gái, tốt bụng, nhiệt tình, chu đáo, cute phô mai que không có gì chê được cả

sample_comments.title: Misleading
sample_comments.text:
DO NOT GO HERE. LISTEN TO ALL THE BAD REVIEWS, THEY ARE SADLY REAL.
Bottomline is this place has THE WORST SERVICE and IS NOT SAFE AND CLEAN AT ALL. If you fear getting bed bugs as you travel or someone breaking in your room, do not go here for your peace. This is a real review.

More detail about my March 2026 booking:

Arrived here at 11PM and scrambled to book an alternative hotel until 2AM --- I was exhausted at that point, but the room, staff, and the whole hotel was just so bad and gave me more stress than looking for a room the night of.

It started with the hotel pickup. They were going to charge me 350.000. My flight arrived on time and I only waited 8 minutes for my checked luggage. I told the driver that that was the case. He did not reply. I walked around to look for his car but I couldn't find it. I texted him and still unresponsive. I contacted the hotel to confirm the driver's location but the receptionist didn't know or didn't know what to do at all. After 20 minutes, i just booked my own grab car. 5 minutes into that drive, driver replied to me a picture that he is just on his way from who-knows-where.

Upon arrival, I couldn't even tell if that was the hotel at all. It was gated, with a long dark hallway waiting for you to walk into. I couldn't figure out how to get in cause it was so dark. I rang the bell multiple times. But someone else just walked in, reached for the lock inside, and opened the gate.

To the left of the suspicious hallway's end is the reception. The receptionist looked sick and panicky. It took a while before he finished talking to the customer before me, so i waited even more. He gave me room ***. I went up and found out that it's the last room number, so it was at the very edge. The thing is, the room didn't even have a room number unlike the other rooms. In the photos, you will see that the hallway gets narrow and more unmaintained-looking as it gets closer to the room ***. Then the stairs next to it had random items. So not having the room number and how horrible it looked made me question if that is room ***at all. I walked end-to-end of the floor to make sure I wasn't being stupid. But then I just tried my keys to open it. The door suggests it can be opened with either a key or a card. Neither worked. I kept trying to make sure again if i just wasn't being stupid. It won't work so I called the staff. He picked up and asked me to wait cause he is in the elevator. He arrived and gave me a giggle as though it meant "oh this is easy." But then he had to turn it around and back to open. I was so tired so I just let that slide at that point and figured i will deal with it in the morning.

But then I entered the room. It looks so old and dirty and insects were running through the cups. The bathroom only had a curtain separating it from the bedroom. Walls have holes in them. Electrical wirings reveal themselves. And there is a musty smell. Nothing there --- including the bed --- smelled fresh and clean at all. I can also hear the people in my floor talking very clearly.

I immediately opened my computer to look for an alternative hotel --- at midnight, this was not an easy task, especially availability shown is for the next night already. It is also not an easy task if you don't want to pay more than *** for a night. Luckily, I found one with very professional people and comfortable bed just 3 minutes away that gave me a steep discount out of their kindness towards my situation. I left without checking out that night because who knows where the receptionist is. Since he looked very sick too, i hope he was just resting at that point.

I'm a very generous person in my reviews. This is the first time I'm leaving this kind of review. You ruined my trip, Hanoi Memory Central Hotel and Spa. I don't know how everyone who runs this place can sleep at night in peace given all the bad reviews.

Please just close down if you can't figure your maintenance. You're posing health and security risks to people.

sample_comments.title: Highly disappointing and Unresponsive - Avoid this property
sample_comments.text:
I am extremely frustrated with my experience at this hotel. Despite facing an emergency flight cancellation due to typhoon whispa, the property was completely unresponsive to all my inquiries and pleas to cancel my booking. 

While I understand that there's no cancellation policy, any establishment in the tourism industry should demonstrate empathy and flexibility during unforeseen circumstances like a typhoon, which is clearly a force majeure event. We had no control over the situation, and to be charged for the entire stay instead of just the first night(at the very least) is simply outrageous and shows a complete lack of understanding.

I had hoped the property would show some discretion regarding when to charge, especially under such dire circumstances.

For all future travelers, I strongly advise against booking with this property. There are other hotels that would prioritize customer well-being and common sense over strict adherence to policies, especially in emergency situations.

sample_comments.title: DO NOT BOOK THIS HOTEL --- Extremely Unprofessional & Misleading!
sample_comments.text:
I strongly advise everyone to avoid this hotel at all costs. Below is my genuine experience:

I had booked my stay here well in advance --- for 1st-2nd October and again from 6th-9th October, through Agoda. The price shown during booking seemed attractive, so I confirmed both stays about a month before my trip. However, the trouble started even before my arrival.

Despite repeatedly messaging the hotel through the Agoda platform to confirm my booking, I received no response. Then, just one day before my travel, the hotel suddenly messaged saying that the price I booked at was "too low" and that I would need to pay extra upon arrival because of an issue in Agoda's pricing. When I asked them to clarify, they stopped responding altogether until I actually reached Vietnam.

Now, as a paying customer, I don't understand why I should be the one to deal with their pricing disputes with Agoda. That is clearly between the hotel and the booking platform, not the guest. Agoda assured me they would help with a refund if I paid extra (which I am still waiting on).

When I finally arrived and paid the extra amount, things got worse --- we were downgraded to their smallest and most basic room, even though we had booked a better one. When questioned, the staff simply said there were no other rooms available. We had no choice but to stay since it was late at night.

For my second booking (6th-9th October), the same issue happened again --- they demanded extra payment, and I ended up canceling and booking an Airbnb instead.

As for the rooms, they were extremely basic, old, and poorly maintained. Many things didn't work, and the so-called "balcony" was barely big enough to stand in.

In short, this was one of the worst hotel experiences I've ever had. Misleading listings, rude communication, unprofessional behavior, and false advertising --- all rolled into one.

 Please do not make the same mistake I did. Stay away from this hotel.

sample_comments.title: DON'T BOOK HERE

Bed sheets were stained. Facilities were deteriorated; this applied to the common areas too. Their rooms are definitely not sound-proofing whatsoever as we could hear the neighbors party until morning and smelled their cigarette odor. We brought this up to the receptionist only to get a "there's nothing we can do about that." sample_comments.title: Read this review before booking
sample_comments.text:
PLEASE READ THIS BEFORE YOU BOOK:

Firstly, the hotel is situated in a narrow, small alleyway, which can be confusing to locate. Upon arrival, we entered a lobby where motorbikes were parked, and it seemed like there had been a fire or something similar. We were informed that the room lacked a window and was on a low floor. When we inquired about the possibility of a higher floor room, we were told it depended on availability, although they should have communicated this limitation beforehand.

The disappointment escalated when we entered the room---it was exceptionally small, less than 9 square meters, with only a bed and some very old furniture. The overall condition appeared old and dirty. Despite our efforts to negotiate for cleaning or a room change, everything felt uncomfortable and strange. Although the receptionist attempted to clean the room, it didn't improve much.

In summary, do not expect much from this hotel.

The single star rating is solely for the staff, particularly Fook, the night receptionist, who was exceptionally kind and went above and beyond to try to make us comfortable despite the challenging circumstances. Kudos to him.

sample_comments.title: Booked for 1 night, stayed 1 hour
sample_comments.text:
Booked a budget room for 1 night but stayed 1 hour maximum - most of which was us looking for somewhere else to stay.

We saw about 6 cockroaches as we entered the room - including on the bed.
There was mould everywhere; mattress, mattress protector, around the AC, in the bathroom, the air was damp - also no bedroom window which didn't help.
The bathroom and bedroom were separated by a curtain - added to the damp air.
The mugs on the table were dirty.
Even the corridor outside was dirty and in bad shape - just a general lack of care.
Walking along the corridor to our room we caught a glimpse of another room which was in potentially a worse state than ours.

While the girl in reception was nice enough and the location is good it doesn't make it worth while especially when we managed to find somewhere nicer for the same price a 3 minute walk away.

It's also interesting that you have to pay before arriving and the last opportunity to cancel is the day before your arrival. While other places we have been you pay on arrival and they have all been a lot better.

I booked a room with a balcony, but when we arrived we were given a room with a window that cannot even be opened. This was already a bad start since it was completely different from what was advertised.
The overall condition of the place was also very disappointing. The staff were frequently away from the reception desk, and at one point we even saw staff sleeping near the reception entrance. It was difficult to get assistance when needed.
There were garbage and dirty linens scattered around the property, and several chairs and tables were broken. The stairs also looked unsafe, which made the place feel poorly maintained.
Instructions inside the room were simply written on paper with no proper documentation, which made the whole setup feel unprofessional.
The photos on the Agoda listing are very misleading and do not reflect the actual condition of the property at all. The reality is far from what is shown online.
What makes it worse is that this place is not even the cheapest option, yet the quality and service were far below expectations.
Overall, a very disappointing experience.

sample_comments.title: Dissapointed - Room is different from what is on Agoda
sample_comments.text:
As a loyal customer of Agoda and a frequent traveler, I and our whole family are disappointed. The pictures posted on Agoda are different from what we saw at the hotel.

- The hotel is evidently old.

- We booked two rooms, and the staff asked us to wait for one and a half hours to check in (check-in time is 2PM, but we were able to check in at 3:30PM).

- The bathroom of one room does not have a door, just a curtain. That's why you need to turn off the AC for you to take a shower.

- Water supply in the morning is interrupted. The staff could not explain why, but if you have a tour, be ready to go to your tour without taking a shower.

- The refrigerator of one room is not working.

Agoda should not rely on the photos that their affiliates are sending. They should also have a representative who should check and visit the hotels for truthfulness and transparency.

As customers we pay what agoda is asking as to pay but were not getting quality service and yet what we get is just a false information and advertisement.

I booked a deluxe room with a bathtub but was given a room without one and with no garden view. I requested to change rooms, but the bathtub in the replacement room was dirty and not advisable to use. There was also a hole in the ceiling.
We experienced no running water for almost two hours. For breakfast, you have to go to a different location, about a 2-3 minute walk away, with very limited options. We were not informed of this during check-in.
This was especially inconvenient since we are a group of nine people. When we arrived at the breakfast place, we were told that only five people were included. I had to keep going back to the reception, but the receptionist was sleeping.
The hotel seriously needs renovation. There was also a man smoking outside our room, and the smoke entered the room. Two of the female receptionists were helpful, but the male staff were not.

I know this is a budget room, but I also stayed in a few budget rooms in Vietnam, and all I had were good experiences except this one before my flight back home. 

1) The floor where I stayed had so much noise. There's an ongoing renovation, I could hear all the noise from the construction.

2) There's no cold water on the shower, only hot! And I wanted to take a shower before midnight because I had a flight in the morning. I had to follow-up 2-3 times for them to fix it. In the end I had to suggest them to just transfer me to another room because it's already late (close to midnight) and I want to shower and rest so bad.

3) There's a problem with their wifi connection, it goes on and off. Sometimes there's a connection (slow) and sometimes there's no. I also heard this from other fellow guest from another floor complaining about their wifi connection.

4) It took 2 hrs or more before I got transferred to another room. The bathroom of the room I was transferred in was ongoing construction. (The mirror is on the floor, there's no soap holder, there are remnants of cement on the floor) I think the noise I heard earlier on was on this room.

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.text: The location is good, situated in the old town area, allowing you to leave your bags and walk to attractions. It is close to food sources and beer streets, but the entrance is a very narrow alley, making it quite hard to find. It is near a shrine. I stayed here for 2 nights and changed rooms 3 times because the room on the first night had a strong smell of incense, cigarette smoke, and was very musty, making it hard for me to breathe. The air conditioning was not cold and there was water dripping; the TV could not be turned on. I informed the staff and requested to change rooms that night, but it was 10:00 PM already, so I couldn't change. The next morning, the staff changed me to a nearby room, which was very cramped and I could barely open my suitcase. In the evening, I returned to the room and found that the air conditioning was leaking water and was very noisy, making it impossible to sleep. I informed the staff, and they came to check and fix it but it didn't get back to normal. They told me that I would have to turn off the air conditioning that night. I then requested to change rooms at that time. They went to check available rooms and came back within 10 minutes to tell me that I could change rooms, but I had to check out before 10:30 because the next day there would be guests checking in early. I agreed, and my friend and I moved to the new room that night in the middle of the night. The rooms here are very small, musty, and have no windows. There was no phone signal and the wifi was not working. I might return to stay here again, but I would need to upgrade to a better room if I pay a higher price.

sample_comments.title: Worst Hotel Ever
sample_comments.text:
I have never stayed in a hotel this bad. 

I chose a room here and what I got was 2 days of sleeping here without air conditioning or fans, in the middle of 37 degree weather in Hanoi. 

On the first day of checking in, we had to change rooms 4 times in 3 days. The rattan bed was very itchy, making me very uncomfortable, and my skin was irritated. We are inherently very easy-going and wanted to ignore the hotel, but the hotel really disappointed us in terms of equipment and supplies. 

No air conditioning, no fan, nor did they move us to a better room, but they moved us to a room worse than a cheap motel. 

Equipment is too old, too outdated, and does not meet customer needs. I only have compliments for the reception staff and service staff, but I am really disappointed with this hotel. It's even worse than a motel. You need to pay attention when choosing.

Tôi chưa bao giờ ở một cái khách sạn tệ đến như thế này. Tôi chọn phòng ở đây và cái tôi nhận được là 2 ngày ngủ ở đây không có điều hoà không có quạt, giữa thời tiết 37 độ ở Hà Nội. Ngay ngày đầu nhận phòng chúng tôi đã phải chuyển phòng tới 4 lần trong 3 ngày. Giường nện thì rất ngứa khiến tôi rất khó chịu, và da đã bị kích ứng. Chúng tôi vốn dĩ rất dễ tính và đã muốn bỏ qua cho khách sạn nhưng thật sự khách sạn khiến chúng tôi quá thất vọng về vật tư trang thiết bị. Không điều hoà, không quạt, cũng không dời chúng tôi qua một căn phòng tốt hơn, mà đã dời chúng tôi qua một căn phòng còn tệ hơn cả một cái nhà trọ rẻ tiền. Trang thiết bị quá cũ, quá lỗi thời, không đáp ứng đủ nhu cầu của khách hàng. Tôi chỉ có lời khen với các bạn nhân viên lễ tân và phục vụ nhưng tôi thật sự quá thất vọng về khách sạn này. sample_comments.title: DONT STAY IN A BUDGET ROOM - BUGS EVERYWHERE!!
sample_comments.text: Our first night here we stayed in a deluxe double which was very comfy and had a lovely bathroom. Annoyingly we had to move the second night to a budget double and over the course of the day we found three different bugs in our bed - no idea where they came from. Eventually at 2am after discovering the 3rd bug we went to reception and asked to be moved. The guy on reception moved us to another deluxe room, however it was very quickly clear that it hadn't been turned over since the last resident (bin was full, hair on sheets, empty water bottles, bathroom clearly used). The staff are friendly and will try to help you as much as they can so if you have problems, let them know. We decided to stay in the room despite our problems at it was late and we didn't have much choice. We probably wouldn't stay here again UNLESS we got our first room back. Sadly we think it's luck of the draw as to whether you get a decent room or not.

When we arrived, I paid in the reception the same amount booked here in Agoda. But when we saw the room, lo and behold, its worse! Its really a downgrade! The room is old and worn out already, and too tiny to even open our luggage on the floor. The door is also broken, difficult to open or close properly, we have to use more force and some strategy to make it work. sample_comments.title: Tired, tatty, and mouldy
sample_comments.text: There is no way this hotel is 4 star. It might scrape in at a 3? It is obvious whoever owns the hotel hasn't invested in upkeep in a long time. The lobby roof has a gaping hole about a meter wide with water dripping through and other large patches about to cave in. The room was "clean-ish". But the bathroom had mould everywhere and covering the curtain. The towels are worn thin and tattered. The walls haven't had a good scrub maybe ever. Scuff marks and grime everywhere. The two good things were being right in the old quarter and the friendly / helpful staff. There are plenty of other nice places to stay in the area for an affordable price. I would recommend trying one of those.

Secondly we had to spend a lengthy amount of time to shower because the water pressure is so weak and the showroom head is leaking and notfit for purpose. The kettle doesn't work and produced the burning smell. The bedsheets, pillow cases and towels looked like a decade old. Even though we booked for 2 night but decidEd to vacate and bare the loss after 1 night stay and looked for another hotel to stay for the rest of our trip.
The only pro is the prime location, however with the same budget we could easily find another decent hotel in the same area.
The most disappointing stay ever!

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.text: This is not a 4-star hotel. Don't believe the photos. Rooms are old. Facilities are run down.

sample_comments.title: They are just providing room
sample_comments.text: Don't expect a hotel like experience. It is just a room service , location is decent, near the beer street. But no extra services available. No breakfast option either. You can get better hotel at these prices.

sample_comments.title: Very Old Building, not worth it.
sample_comments.text: Very old building, maybe budget friendly but facilities not adequate, No restaurant, no pool, no proper dining area, No windows or ventilation. Only plus is location and smoking anywhere.

sample_comments.title: The worst place that I stayed
sample_comments.text: Dirty, so uncomfortable staying here. Can't get a good sleep at all.

sample_comments.title: If you're choosing just based on the location!
sample_comments.text: The door lock cannot be locked from the outside. The outlet by the bed does not work. The security box is broken. The air conditioner doesn't turn on. The hair dryer does not blow air. There is a shower next to the toilet, which is confusing. The sheets have hair on them. However, I liked the location, so I'll give it a circle! I want to drink and have fun in the old town! If you're just there to sleep and don't mind these issues, go ahead.

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.text: They gave me the room at 6th floor. But there was no elevator. They do not also have any staff stand by.

sample_comments.title: Good location and friendly staffs
sample_comments.text: We stayed for 2 nights. The hotel is right in the Hanoi old quater and very easy to access.

sample_comments.title: not so good
sample_comments.text: The hotel was in a good location but the entrance was too narrow for our luggage. We had a hard time going in and out of the hall and the entrance along the road. It also has a foul odor that smells like old wood.

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.text: Room was mildewy ,bedding damp was gross nothing like photo ,good location polite staff

sample_comments.title: ExpectationVsReality
sample_comments.text: This hotel was an example of expectation versus reality. While the photos online appear appealing, the actual condition of the room did not meet those expectations. The room had an unpleasant, old odor, the window lock was broken, and the toilet's glass door was damaged and covered with a curtain. Additionally, the television appeared unstable and poorly mounted. Although the room was generally clean, it was not well maintained and did not reflect the quality shown in the pictures. Overall, I did not feel safe or comfortable during my stay.

sample_comments.title: Deceiving pictures
sample_comments.text: Hotel condition was a lot worse than the pictures, run down and old, inside a dingy alley, very noisy staff especially in the early morning

sample_comments.title: Good hotel location. Poor service
sample_comments.text:
When we checked in, we had to wait for about 2 hours as they havent cleaned up the room yet. And when they told us that we can already go in, the room still was not fixed and cleaned up. Also had to carry our luggages in the 6th floor as the elevator was broken. 

Good hotel overall. Just manage your expectations. Different from pictures.

sample_comments.title: Bad Memory Hotel
sample_comments.text: we stayed in Memory hotel from 13 to 16th November 2025. we were given room no 505. The rooms has a joint toilet & bathroom, however it does not have a door, but only a curtain to cover it. The wooden flooring is broken. Few cockroaches were also in the room. However the hotel location is very good as it is very close to old quarter.

sample_comments.title: Far from expected
sample_comments.text: Far from expected

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.text:
Only thing good about this place is their staff at reception. 1 day stay is fine incase you have no other options.
Not for family or couples as rooms are matchbox sized

sample_comments.title: SMELLY HALLWAY
sample_comments.text: I recommend this hotel for luggage storage only or if you want to freshen up before going for tour and while waiting for your bus going to Sapa. It's affordable, staff is accommodating but the facilities are nah.

sample_comments.title: Nothing like the pictures
sample_comments.text: The place was in such bad smell and bad conditions

sample_comments.title: You could stay somewhere better
sample_comments.text: Though this hotel was cheap, still, we could have stayed somewhere better. Restroom in the reception is dirty and smelly. The rooms are outdated and tight compared to the photos shown. Though the aircon is really good, comfort room is also good. Downside is the location, this hotel is a bit far from the lake and the usual go-to places. It's far from beer street and bancong.

sample_comments.title: Memorable
sample_comments.text: This hotel is located at the old town which is accessible to the local attraction and food. However, the night is quite noisy. I would prefer staying in the new town instead. Anyway a good memorable stay.

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.text:
We stayed here while waiting for our overnight sleeper bus to Sapa: we mainly want to freshen up and have a place to store our luggages (we came straight from the airport) while we walk around old quarter. Location wise, it is good. The hotel has a lift so easier to manage our luggages. 

Cons - room is small, stuffy and damp. No windows. Air-conditioning wasn't really functioning. Furnitures were old, poor cleanliness, can see few cockroaches. Water pressure is also low. 

Overall, you get what you paid. There's pros and cons with the cheap ones.

sample_comments.title: Not worthy
sample_comments.text: For the given price point, The room was OK. But i had to face lot of issues like low lighting. Missing Mirror in room. Poor infrastructure. Staff were good to help. However, Property is unmaintained.

sample_comments.title: Not recommend
sample_comments.text: Hotel was kept very untidy. Poor lighting in the room. Balcony is very congested one person can barely stand. Staff is not responsive. You can get better hotels in this rate.

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.text: depends on if you have some other options or not, if not then fine but have to adjust in such a room

sample_comments.title: Value for Money
sample_comments.text: This is not a 3 star hotel. You have to enter a small alley to reach the hotel. It might look shady at first. But it's value for the money you spend. Housekeeping staff cleaned and maintained the room everyday. Front desk folks were nice and friendly. The hotel is located next to the highway. Taxi to Airport takes 30 minutes during evenings. Beer Street and Dong Xuan market are nearby.

sample_comments.title: Terrible experience
sample_comments.text: On my 2nd day, I supposed to check out, however, there was no receptionist for 20 mins. Hence, I had to leave the room card at reception table and without any invoice.

sample_comments.title: It was damp and stuffy.
sample_comments.text: It was terrible and couldn't sleep, A/C couldn't be adjusted

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.text: Dirty n smelly

sample_comments.title: Agoda advertised room disagreement
sample_comments.text:
We booked a Deluxe King room with balcony with 40% discount. When arriving ay the hotel, we were told that the room is not available because the previous guest extended their stay! Then we were put in a room of lower grade and told that this room is for the price we paid Agoda. The room did not match the photo advertised on Agoda.
Hotel management demanded 200,000 vnd extra if we wanted to stay in the room as advertised!
Totally disappointed with all the hasles.
Other issues included non-functional safe and the "balcony turned out to be just a grilled fence outside the window where one could not even stand

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.text: The staff is great , generally Vietnamese are awesome people, the hotel is in an good location but the rooms ( that I know ) the ones that are standard have a painted glass window ( faces a wall ) and the smell of the bathroom will stay in your nose for quite sometimes after you left the country, I don't want to put this hotel down , but I feel that it should be known, the owner could say what we are getting for the money and not playing with publishing fancy pictures for room that not there - I don't know how other rooms look like , mine was standard , personally I wouldn't go back . And please update your bathrooms or enlarge the room and dig a hole in the courtyard to use as a bathroom

sample_comments.title: Not worth of the money
sample_comments.text:
The reality is not the same the description . I book the room nearly 28$ for 1 night, they describe that there's carpark but actually it's not THEIR carpark. It's operated by the local residents without receipt. Actually it's not a " real carpark", it doesn't have a area for parking and just park randomly somewhere on the street . The parking fee is 12$. So the total cost is nearly 40$. To be honest, with that amount of money, we could book a better hotel. Room is not so satisfying too. The TV is out of service, power connection but cannot turn on ( again, not like the advertise). The bath tub and shower have hot water but really hard to use. We just can basically sleep here. The staffs are not really friendly. They just had explanation without any solution for the mistakes or problems, which is nonsense:)
The hotel located near the city center, which have many activities to do. The one good thing of the hotel.

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.text: Is not a 4 star hotel to be honest

sample_comments.title: Instagram vs Reality
sample_comments.text: The location was convenient, but the room was very stuffy and had water damage. It smelled like mildew and they didn't initially provide enough towels. Even though we were in a non smoking room, we could smell cigarette smoke from other guests coming into our room. The staff was very communicative and easy to reach.

sample_comments.title: Bad staff
sample_comments.text: They are not to be honest. When I checked in, they said my room is under renovation then they suggested me to replace another room which was very small space and no windows and they showed me another one without balcony while I still insist, finally I got my room that I made booking even I paid and get confirmation. Very annoyed

sample_comments.title: Very disappointed! Last minute change of hotel.
sample_comments.text:
We were informed at the very last minute that the hotel we originally booked was suddenly unavailable due to fixing which seem unreasonable. We were transferred to another facility owned by the same management around 200m away. Since it was already last minute, we had no real choice but to accept. Unfortunately, the replacement hotel was not at the same standard as the one we originally booked. The area was also noisy, making it difficult for us to sleep at night. Hotel is too old the washroom is too worn and not properly clean. Linens/pillows/towels are not clean. We borrow a flat iron and it feels like the safety of the guest is not their priority. They should have booked us in other hotel with the same standard of what we've paid for.

This kind of last-minute hotel transfer should not happen to guests. We hope Agoda can address this issue and implement stricter rules to prevent similar experiences for future travellers.

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.text: Low standard. Pipes leaked, no shampoo, worn out and dirty bedsheets and a huge cockroach in the bathroom. Good location and price.

sample_comments.title: Decent Stay with Some Drawbacks
sample_comments.text: The location is good making it easy to explore nearby areas however the room size felt carmped and issues with the bathroom and hot water affected comfort. Some lights are also broken and no hairdryer.

secondary.description_full:
Khách sạn & Spa Ký Ức Trung tâm Hà Nội

Tận dụng nhiều điểm thu hút mà Hà Nội có với việc ở lại Khách sạn & Spa Ký Ức Trung tâm Hà Nội. Trải nghiệm văn hóa đích thực của Hà Nội thật dễ dàng khi ở lại Khách sạn & Spa Ký Ức Trung tâm Hà Nội, cách Phố Cổ chỉ 390 m.
Tại Khách sạn & Spa Ký Ức Trung tâm Hà Nội, khách nhất định sẽ có một kỳ nghỉ thư thái. Không bao giờ mất liên lạc với các mối liên hệ của quý khách, với Wi-Fi miễn phí được cung cấp trong suốt thời gian của quý khách. Nếu quý khách cần một chuyến xe đi từ hoặc đến sân bay, khách sạn có thể sắp xếp xe trước ngày quý khách nhận phòng. Khách sạn cung cấp các dịch vụ taxi, cho thuê xe hơi và xe đưa đón để giúp quý khách đến nơi mình muốn ở Hà Nội. Đối với những khách đến bằng xe hơi, bãi đỗ xe được cung cấp miễn phí. Quý khách sẽ không gặp vấn đề gì khi lên kế hoạch cho các ngày và nhu cầu vận chuyển của mình với các dịch vụ quầy lễ tân bao gồm két sắt, nhận phòng hoặc trả phòng nhanh, giữ hành lý và Dịch vụ nhân viên chăm sóc khách hàng. Nếu quý khách muốn có chỗ ngồi để giải trí tốt nhất tại thành phố, quý khách có thể nhận được sự giúp đỡ qua chuyến du lịch và dịch vụ vé của khách sạn. Những tối lạnh giá thậm chí còn tuyệt hơn những tối ấm áp, khi quý khách có thể sưởi ấm bên lò sưởi của khách sạn. Mặc trang phục yêu thích của quý khách lại nhiều lần nhờ phòng máy giặt tự động, dịch vụ giặt khô và dịch vụ giặt là được cung cấp tại Khách sạn & Spa Ký Ức Trung tâm Hà Nội. Những tiện ích trong phòng như dịch vụ tại phòng, dịch vụ tại phòng 24 giờ và dọn phòng hằng ngày sẽ làm cho kỳ nghỉ trở thành một lựa chọn tuyệt vời. Quý khách quên đóng gói thứ gì đó? Tất cả nhu cầu vào phút cuối của quý khách có thể được cửa hàng tiện lợi đáp ứng, giúp quý khách tiết kiệm thời gian và không gặp rắc rối. Vì sự thoải mái và sức khỏe của tất cả khách nghỉ, hút thuốc bị cấm tại bất kỳ nơi nào trong khuôn viên khách sạn.
Hút thuốc chỉ được giới hạn trong các khu vực được chỉ định vì sức khỏe và sự an toàn của tất cả khách nghỉ và nhân viên. Một loạt các tiện nghi được cung cấp tại các phòng nghỉ ở Khách sạn & Spa Ký Ức Trung tâm Hà Nội. Nghỉ lại vui vẻ hơn nữa tại khách sạn khi biết rằng một số phòng được chọn bao gồm rèm che ánh sáng và điều hòa.
Một số phòng tại Khách sạn & Spa Ký Ức Trung tâm Hà Nội thậm chí còn có các đặc điểm thiết kế thêm như ban công hoặc sân hiên. Một số phòng có ti-vi để làm cho khách lúc nào cũng thấy thoải mái giải trí.
Trong một số phòng chọn lọc, quý khách có thể tùy ý sử dụng máy pha trà hoặc cà phê, nước đóng chai và tủ lạnh nhỏ chứa đồ uống. Thật tốt khi biết rằng máy sấy tóc và vật dụng tắm rửa được cung cấp trong một số phòng tắm của khách.

Ăn uống và các hoạt động

Mỗi buổi sáng, quý khách có thể bắt đầu ngày mới với bữa sáng ngon miệng tại chỗ được phục vụ ở Khách sạn & Spa Ký Ức Trung tâm Hà Nội. Tận hưởng niềm hạnh phúc buổi sáng với một ngụm cà phê ngon tại quán cà phê nằm bên trong khách sạn. Trong suốt thời gian lưu trú của quý khách, hãy chọn từ nhiều lựa chọn ăn uống ngon miệng tại khách sạn. Quý khách có thể có một đêm đáng nhớ với những người đồng hành của mình mà không cần đi đâu xa, tại quán bar của khách sạn.
Tại Khách sạn & Spa Ký Ức Trung tâm Hà Nội, quý khách thậm chí có thể đặt giao thực phẩm tới tận phòng của mình với dịch vụ thuận tiện của họ.
Ngoài các tiện nghi và dịch vụ, Khách sạn & Spa Ký Ức Trung tâm Hà Nội còn đi xa hơn nữa nhằm đảm bảo rằng tất cả khách nghỉ đều tận dụng tối đa thời gian của họ. Làm ấm vào cuối ngày với một chuyến ghé qua tiệm làm đẹp, mát-xa và spa.
Thời gian dành cho gia đình vào những buổi tối thư thái thật dễ dàng với phòng chờ chung và khu vực TV của khách sạn.

Khách sạn & Spa Ký Ức Trung tâm Hà Nội (Ha Noi Memory Central Hotel & Spa) - khách sạn 4.0 sao tại Hà Nội.
Địa chỉ: 90 Đ. Trần Nhật Duật, Phố Cổ, Hà Nội, Việt Nam.
Đỗ xe và Wi-Fi luôn miễn phí, vì vậy quý khách có thể giữ liên lạc, đến và đi tùy ý. Nằm ở vị trí trung tâm tại Phố Cổ của Hà Nội, chỗ nghỉ này đặt quý khách ở gần các điểm thu hút và tùy chọn ăn uống thú vị. Đừng rời đi trước khi ghé thăm Phố Cổ nổi tiếng. Được xếp hạng 4 sao, chỗ nghỉ chất lượng cao này cho phép khách nghỉ sử dụng mát-xa, nhà hàng và spa ngay trong khuôn viên.
